name: Huntsman CORP
business: Huntsman Corporation is a global manufacturer of diversified organic chemical products operating in three segments: Polyurethanes, Performance Products, and Advanced Materials. Its products are marketed primarily to industrial and building product manufacturers and are used in applications such as adhesives, aerospace, automotive, coatings, construction, electronics, insulation, power generation, and refining.
sellsTo: adhesives, aerospace, automotive, coatings and construction
construction products, durable and non-durable consumer products
electronics, insulation, power generation and refining
building insulation, construction products, automotive, footwear
cold chain, furniture, fuel and lubricant additives
paints and coatings, composites, gas treatment
oil and gas, printed circuit boards, electrical power transmission
recreational sports equipment, medical appliances, food and beverage packaging

exposures.sentence: We are a global manufacturer of diversified organic chemical products.
Our Advanced Materials segment is a leading global supplier of advanced, high-performance materials for the fabrication and repair of aircraft components.
Major end markets include: building insulation, construction products, automotive, including electric vehicles, and footwear.
Amines are used in polyurethane foam, fuel and lubricant additives, paints and coatings, composites, gas treatment, construction materials and semiconductor cleaning solutions.
E-GRADE specialty amines for semiconductor manufacturing and electrolytes for electric vehicle batteries.
Polyurethane chemicals are used to produce rigid and flexible foams, as well as coatings, adhesives, sealants and elastomers. Major end markets include: building insulation, construction products...
We are a leading global supplier of insulating materials for motors, generators, switchgears, distribution and instrument transformers, and insulators and bushings for electrical power applications.
